page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: EDCI751 or TLPL710.

Formerly: EDCI751.

TLPL711 Foundations of Mathematics Education II: Theory and Research on Mathematics Teaching (3 Credits)

Knowledge of and insights into how mathematics has been and is

being taught; theories about how it might be taught. Familiarity with the methods used to do research on teaching and to improve teaching. Prerequisite: TLPL710; or permission of EDUC-Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership department.
